name: morphology_profile_query
description: Morphology profile query against a reference perturbation library to gene-weighted programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: query_profiles_tsv
inputs.description: Wide query profile table with one row per sample/query and numeric morphology features

inputs.name: query_metadata_tsv
inputs.description: Optional query metadata keyed by query/sample id for replicate grouping

inputs.name: reference_profiles_tsv
inputs.description: Reference perturbation profile table when not using a bundle

inputs.name: reference_profiles_parquet
inputs.description: Reference perturbation profile parquet table when optional parquet dependencies are installed

inputs.name: reference_metadata_tsv
inputs.description: Reference perturbation metadata keyed by perturbation_id

inputs.name: feature_schema_tsv
inputs.description: Optional explicit feature order/schema used for feature alignment

inputs.name: feature_stats_tsv
inputs.description: Optional feature center/scale table used for reference-based standardization

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label for metadata/GMT naming

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Optional signature label for metadata/GMT naming

parameters.name: group_query_by
parameters.help: Optional query metadata column used to aggregate replicate profiles

parameters.name: exclude_query_ids_from_reference
parameters.help: Drop reference perturbations whose IDs overlap query IDs

parameters.name: reference_id_column
parameters.help: ID column in reference profile table

parameters.name: compound_target_gene_symbol_column
parameters.help: Target gene symbol column in compound_targets_tsv

parameters.name: compound_target_weight_column
parameters.help: Optional target weight column in compound_targets_tsv

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional resources directory containing morphology bundle files

parameters.name: reference_bundle_id
parameters.help: Bundle resource id providing reference_profiles/reference_metadata/compound_targets and optional schema/stats

parameters.name: similarity_metric
parameters.help: Similarity metric between query and reference profiles

parameters.name: similarity_power
parameters.help: Evidence sharpness exponent applied to positive or negative similarities

parameters.name: polarity
parameters.help: Emit similar matches, opposite matches, or both as separate programs

parameters.name: max_reference_neighbors
parameters.help: Retain at most this many reference neighbors per query and polarity (0 disables truncation).

parameters.name: min_similarity
parameters.help: Ignore retained neighbors below this similarity threshold after polarity transform.

parameters.name: compound_weight
parameters.help: Modality weight for compound-derived evidence when both modalities are present

parameters.name: genetic_weight
parameters.help: Modality weight for genetic-derived evidence when both modalities are present

parameters.name: emit_full
parameters.help: Write geneset.full.tsv for each morphology program

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write per-program and combined GMT outputs

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Emit sets smaller than gmt_min_genes with warning

outputs.name: manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Program-level grouped output manifest across query programs

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.tsv
outputs.description: Selected gene weights for one morphology query program

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.meta.json
outputs.description: Metadata and provenance for one query program

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.full.tsv
outputs.description: Full ranked score table for one query program (optional)
